sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n56941" key="kerxnwto/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κερχν-ωτός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n56941.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">roughened</tr_>, Id.s.v.<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κατακερχνοῦται</foreign>: <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τὰ κ.</foreign> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">embossed plate</tr_>, Id.</sense> </entryFree>
